description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Everything about this place is recommended. Helpful and friendly staff, strategic location and spacious room.  However, there is an issue with this smell coming from the toilet. The hotel management needs to look into this matter and take due action to overcome it. Some guests can be picky. We just keep the bathroom door closed.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kamar nyaman dengan ukuran kamar yang cukup luas, berjendela menghadap pegunungan. Kamar mandi luas sekali dibandingkan dengan hotel-hotel sekelasnya. Air hangat mengalir dengan baik meski tidak bisa terlalu panas, tetapi cukup, hanya blowernya terdengar ribut karena pintu kamar mandi tidak bisa rapat ditutup dari luar. Koneksi internet baik. Lokasi di tepi jalan utama. Di sekitar banyak  tempat makan. Stafnya ramah.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: overall bagus cuma agak kurang di wifi nya soalnya gabisa dipake gitu

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Petugas ramah, Namun syang sekali, petugas tdk menanyakan pilihan kamar mau di lt brp, langsung dikasih yg lt. 1 sehingga view tdk ada sama sekali. Sedikit kecewa

comments.reviewTitle: nyaman, murah serivce dan layanan bagus

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Pelayanan sangat bagus. Resepsionis dan petugas hotel nya ramah2. Kamar luas dan bersih. Ada lift. AC dingin. Rekomded menginap disini yg akan menyeberang ke sabang. Karena cukup dekat dengan pelabuhan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotelnya ok, harga lumayan murah. Kualitas mantap.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Parkir luas, dekat masjid raya dan pinggir jalan raya tidak susah di cari

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Beli kamar delux dauble dikasik kayak losmen, kloset sumbat, water heater gak fungsi, minta pindah kamar gak dikasih,,, psn kar luas 39m² dikasih 24m²,,, nyesel banget
